category.name: zoo.event.christmas.comic
category.item: Merry Christmas!
From December 21st to January 2nd, everything in your zoo revolves around Christmas! Decorate your Christmas tree and help me save Christmas!
First raise 8 flying reindeer and then one Santa Rudolph for his sleigh. For each reindeer you bring him, you will receive a gift.
From time to time, Santa will also give you an ornament for your Christmas tree. At the end, you will be able to keep your decorated tree.
Hooray, we have a special Christmas collection here too! Take care of your animals and collect Christmas items. You can also use them to raise reindeer!
Great surprises in the Christmas shop
Transform your zoo into a colorful Winter World: with lots of new and popular Christmas decorations.
Merry Christmas and have fun at the Christmas event!

category.name: zoo.event.christmas.layer
category.item: This is terrible! Santa's reindeer have run away and now he can't deliver presents! Bring him 8 flying reindeer and Santa's Rudolph and place them in front of his sleigh. As a thank you, you will receive great gifts!
Santa is on his way to:
You won:
Look at your Christmas tree in the parking lot!
Get some new outfit for your avatar!
Quick, take a look at your inventory!
Thank you!
Your reindeer can't wait to get on the road. Thanks to you, the Christmas is saved!
Thank you!
There are still some of my reindeer missing, however it's time for me to get on the road! Don't worry, I will figure it out - after all, I'm Santa Claus!
The decorated Christmas tree from your parking lot is now in your inventory.
First, let's bring 8 magic reindeer to Santa.
Santa already has 8 flying reindeer and all he needs is his Rudolph!

category.name: zoo.event.christmas.rewards
category.item: Christmas decoration
Christmas fit
Couple of snowy owls

category.name: zoo.event.christmas.tooltip
category.item: Number of male magic reindeer in your inventory.
The number of female flying reindeer in your inventory.
Before you bring Santa his Rudolph, he needs 8 flying reindeer first.
The number of male Santa Rudolphs in your inventory.
The number of female Santa Rudolphs in your inventory.
